30.2.11 - Sequence of Qualifying Services and Other Medicare Covered 
Home Health Services 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Once patient eligibility has been confirmed and the plan of care contains physician or 
allowed practitioner orders for the qualifying service as well as other Medicare covered
